query:
UPDATE artist_of_week SET isActive = 0 WHERE isActive = 1;

INSERT INTO artist_of_week (artistName, bio, imageUrl, instagramUrl, youtubeUrl, spotifyUrl, featuredVideoId, isActive, weekOf, createdAt, audioTrackUrl, audioTrackTitle)
VALUES (
  '810 Scam',
  'Flint, Michigan rapper 810 Scam — also known as ScammLikeelyy — is one of the most authentic voices coming out of the 810. Known for his gritty street narratives, sharp punchlines, and unapologetic scam talk, he has built a loyal following across Michigan and beyond. With projects like "3200 Scams," "Punches & Kilos," and "Until I Return," 810 Scam has proven he is not just a rapper — he is a movement. A co-sign from BabyFxce E, road dates, and a growing Spotify presence signal that Flint''s finest is just getting started.',
  NULL,
  'https://www.instagram.com/810scvm/',
  'https://www.youtube.com/@scammlikeelyy',
  'https://open.spotify.com/artist/5mu4UKUV8VcLQEYHpa4N3e',
  NULL,
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NULL,
  NULL
);
